taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Quality Assurance Engineer
must_have_quals: More than 3 years of relevant experience, Genuine interest in computer networking, coding and SW testing, Strives to deliver top-quality with respect to next-gen IP-routing/DataCenter/Mobile technology, Self-driven and eager to learn, Good in programming, networking, debugging, Experience with scripting, python, tcl, git, json, yang
core_responsibilities: You follow up on the evolutions of the internet and data center world, You collaborate with the R&D teams to deliver your feature with exceptional quality to the field and you maintain it during its lifetime, You fully tests all aspects of the features assigned to you, This goes from participating in the requirements discussions, creating the test plan, conducting and automating all test cases until final delivery of the feature and product, Define test strategy, Develop code (in python, TCL, Go other languages) to qualify our Networking, Security and Data Center products, Final Go/No Go decision before a software release, Become an expert (go-to-person) for a number of specific areas (involving features) and gets a good overview of all functionality of our IP range of products, Close interaction with Product management and SW developers teams, Continuous integration environment
job_summary: Nokia’s IP Network Division is focused on revolutionizing network capacity through innovation and technical expertise. They are seeking a QA Engineer to define and automate tests, drive test strategies, and ensure the quality of cutting-edge IP/DataCenter/Mobile features.
